Ddns.// SECRETS: Do NOT put your real API token or personal hostnames here in a public repo. Copy appsettings.local.example.json to appsettings.local.json (git-ignored) and put your real values there — they override the placeholders below.
Ddns.//: Cloudflare API token with Zone:Read + DNS:Edit on the zones you manage. Create at https://dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens (use the 'Edit zone DNS' template).
Ddns.//interval: How often to check & update. TimeSpan format, e.g. 01:00:00 = 1 hour.
Ddns.//hostnameSource: Iis = read host headers from IIS site bindings. Static = use the Hostnames list below. Both = union of both.
Ddns.//hostnames: Used when HostnameSource is Static or Both. The service only touches records that already match these names (or, with CreateIfMissing, creates them).
Ddns.// exclude: Hostnames you do NOT want managed (localhost, internal names, or sites hosted off-box). Matched case-insensitively.
Ddns.//ipProviders: Queried in order; first valid IPv4 wins.
Ddns.//record: RecordTtl & Proxied apply ONLY to records this service creates. Updates to existing records change just the IP and preserve their current proxied flag + TTL.
Ddns.//dryRun: true = log what WOULD change but never write to Cloudflare. Or pass --dry-run on the command line for a one-shot preview.
Ddns.//state: Where the last-known IP is cached so we skip Cloudflare calls when nothing changed.
